subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí! Upon thee be My glory! There hath come unto Us from him whom We had safeguarded for numbered years that which caused lamentation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی علیک بهائی قد ورد علینا من الذی حفظناه فی سنین معدودات ما ناحت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
